title: senecio articulatus
intro: Senecio articulatus, also known as the Cotton Bush, is a plant species native to the southwestern regions of Australia, characterized by its unique cotton-like seeds and yellow flowers. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Senecio articulatus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve breathing, and provide relief from coughs and congestion. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional remedies to treat various health conditions.
